response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure engineering skills with entrepreneurial experience, but lacks explicit AI/ML expertise and direct evidence of building AI-powered products or platforms. Their background in cloud and scalable systems is relevant, but the role's AI strategy focus is not clearly addressed.
strengths: Diverse full-stack and infrastructure experience with scalable systems
Strong technical leadership and mentorship (workshops, talks, dev tooling)
concerns: No explicit AI/ML product development or recognized expertise
Seniority is slightly below the 15-year requirement (14 years)
Limited evidence of strategic cloud/AI platform leadership at scale
